extractedText: Northwind Robotics is a leading industrial automation company founded in 2016. The company specializes in collaborative robots for manufacturing. Headquartered in Detroit, Michigan.
title: About Northwind Robotics

extractedText: CEO: Grace O'Brien. CTO: Dr. Michael Reeves. VP Engineering: Sarah Kim. The leadership team brings decades of experience from Tesla, Boston Dynamics, and Siemens.
title: Leadership Team

extractedText: Northwind Robotics announced today that it has raised $1.2B in Strategic round funding led by Andreessen Horowitz. Total valuation reached $1.2B.
title: Northwind Robotics raises $1.2B in Strategic round

extractedText: Northwind manufactures collaborative robot arms (NW-100, NW-200), AI-powered vision systems, and predictive maintenance software.
title: Products

extractedText: Industrial automation company. Investors include a16z, Sequoia, and Tiger Global. Revenue estimated $50M ARR.
title: Northwind Robotics — PitchBook Profile
